""SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.category_id, v.color, v.created_at, v.created_by, v.current_odometer_km, v.fuel_type_id, v.is_deleted, v.make_id, v.model_id, v.modified_at, v.modified_by, v.notes, v.registration_number, v.status, v.vin, v.year, d.make_id, d.is_active, d.name, d0.model_id, d0.is_active, d0.make_id, d0.name, d1.category_id, d1.description, d1.is_active, d1.name, d2.fuel_type_id, d2.code, d2.is_active, d2.is_electric, d2.label
FROM fleet.vehicle AS v
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_vehicle_make AS d ON v.make_id = d.make_id
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_vehicle_model AS d0 ON v.model_id = d0.model_id
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_vehicle_category AS d1 ON v.category_id = d1.category_id
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_fuel_type AS d2 ON v.fuel_type_id = d2.fuel_type_id
WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
ORDER BY v.registration_number"
commandText:
SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.category_id, v.color, v.created_at, v.created_by, v.current_odometer_km, v.fuel_type_id, v.is_deleted, v.make_id, v.model_id, v.modified_at, v.modified_by, v.notes, v.registration_number, v.status, v.vin, v.year, d.make_id, d.is_active, d.name, d0.model_id, d0.is_active, d0.make_id, d0.name, d1.category_id, d1.description, d1.is_active, d1.name, d2.fuel_type_id, d2.code, d2.is_active, d2.is_electric, d2.label
FROM fleet.vehicle AS v
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_vehicle_make AS d ON v.make_id = d.make_id
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_vehicle_model AS d0 ON v.model_id = d0.model_id
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_vehicle_category AS d1 ON v.category_id = d1.category_id
INNER JOIN fleet.dc_fuel_type AS d2 ON v.fuel_type_id = d2.fuel_type_id
WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
ORDER BY v.registration_number

commandText:
SELECT d.driver_id, d.created_at, d.created_by, d.employee_id, d.is_deleted, d.license_expiry, d.license_number, d.modified_at, d.modified_by, d.notes, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.created_by, e.department, e.email, e.first_name, e.is_active, e.is_deleted, e.last_name, e.modified_at, e.modified_by, e.phone, s.driver_id, s.license_category_id, s.obtained_date, s.license_category_id0, s.code, s.description, s.is_active
FROM fleet.driver AS d
INNER JOIN fleet.employee AS e ON d.employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT d0.driver_id, d0.license_category_id, d0.obtained_date, d1.license_category_id AS license_category_id0, d1.code, d1.description, d1.is_active
    FROM fleet.driver_license_category AS d0
    INNER JOIN fleet.dc_license_category AS d1 ON d0.license_category_id = d1.license_category_id
) AS s ON d.driver_id = s.driver_id
